text: I feel a quiet anticipation moving through these spaces. The first setting, with its sterile glass walls and bright lights, evokes the silence of potential, as if ideas are waiting to be born in this emptiness. In the second scene, the vivid colors and words on the wall stir my curiosity. I notice the interplay between research, technology, and human experience. The display encourages reflection—on how we observe, connect, and evolve. I feel a blend of clinical detachment and creative inspiration, curious about the stories and innovations behind each surface.
